body_txt: There are many reasons why bullies bully people; the reason could be sadism , bigotry , dislike of their victim(s), boredom , or a desire to assert their dominance. However, some bullies, for one reason or another, feel that their actions are actually justified . There are a number of reasons why a bully might get it into their head that their actions are justifiable. Some common ones include:  Sub-Trope of Knight Templar . Compare Playing the Victim Card , Dog-Kicking Excuse , and Jerk Justifications , which these bullies might do. Compare/Contrast School Bullying Is Harmless , which this trope can overlap with if the narrative sides with the bully and Necessarily Evil , which this character tries to apply to bullying (though these characters don't see themselves as evil). See also Might Makes Right , which some bullies might cite as justification. If the bully rationalizes their bullying because of what they aren't doing, see also Even Bullies Have Standards . No Real Life Examples, Please!
